compiled_state.title: RED test: preconditions-validator-lib.sh entry-check and exit-write functions
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Overview
Write the failing test file for the shared preconditions-validator-lib.sh helper before the library exists. Tests must fail (RED) before implementation.

## File Impact
- Create: tests/hooks/test-preconditions-validator-lib.sh

## TDD Requirement
Write test_pv_entry_check_accepts_valid_minimal_event that calls _dso_pv_entry_check with a well-formed minimal-tier PRECONDITIONS event fixture and asserts exit code 0.
Write test_pv_entry_check_rejects_schema_invalid that calls _dso_pv_entry_check with a malformed event and asserts exit code non-zero plus a diagnostic stderr line.
Write test_pv_entry_check_ignores_unknown_fields (depth-agnostic: passes a standard-tier event with extra fields; asserts exit 0 — depth-agnostic forward-compat contract).
Write test_pv_exit_write_emits_preconditions that calls _dso_pv_exit_write with a stage name, upstream event_id, and spec_hash; asserts a PRECONDITIONS JSON file is written to the ticket event dir with the correct schema fields.
Write test_pv_exit_write_schema_roundtrip that calls _dso_pv_exit_write then reads the emitted event back through the schema validator; asserts roundtrip succeeds (SC11 self-verification).
Write test_pv_exit_write_chain_link that asserts the emitted event's upstream_event_id field matches the input event_id parameter.

Given/When/Then for test_pv_exit_write_schema_roundtrip:
Given: a temp ticket dir, a valid upstream event_id, a spec_hash
When: _dso_pv_exit_write is called
Then: the written PRECONDITIONS file passes schema validation (exit 0) when parsed by the shared schema validator

## .test-index RED Markers Required
Add the following RED markers before committing:
tests/hooks/test-preconditions-validator-lib.sh [test_pv_entry_check_accepts_valid_minimal_event]
tests/hooks/test-preconditions-validator-lib.sh [test_pv_entry_check_rejects_schema_invalid]
tests/hooks/test-preconditions-validator-lib.sh [test_pv_entry_check_ignores_unknown_fields]
tests/hooks/test-preconditions-validator-lib.sh [test_pv_exit_write_emits_preconditions]
tests/hooks/test-preconditions-validator-lib.sh [test_pv_exit_write_schema_roundtrip]
tests/hooks/test-preconditions-validator-lib.sh [test_pv_exit_write_chain_link]

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file tests/hooks/test-preconditions-validator-lib.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-preconditions-validator-lib.sh
- [ ] Test file contains all 6 test functions listed above
  Verify: grep -c "^test_pv_" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-preconditions-validator-lib.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 6)}'
- [ ] All 6 tests FAIL before implementation (confirming RED)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-preconditions-validator-lib.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAIL\|not found\|No such"
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED markers for all 6 test functions
  Verify: grep -q '\[test_pv_entry_check_accepts_valid_minimal_event\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] validate.sh --ci passes (exit 0) after this task is committed
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context (all 3 failure messages)
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately
